basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Krenko as mono-red Goblin typal/tokens.
Krenko scales with Goblin density, haste, untap effects and sacrifice damage.
Profile intentionally separates casual token swarm from cEDH all-in combo.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Keep mono-red identity and low curve Goblin density.
Combo pieces are representative and should remain bracket-aware.

themes.name: goblin_typal_tokens
themes.notes: Goblin density turns Krenko activations into exponential board growth.

themes.name: haste_untap_explosions
themes.notes: Haste and untap effects convert Krenko from slow value into immediate pressure.

themes.name: sacrifice_damage_finishers
themes.notes: Goblin Bombardment and similar effects win through stalled boards.

avoid_patterns.reason: Krenko needs density and activation support, not disconnected red goodstuff.

examples: Krenko without haste or untap support
avoid_patterns.reason: Commander becomes too slow and fragile without immediate activation paths.
